content-card.description: Standard wrapper for any section of content — charts, tables, forms.

kpi-card.description: Metric display card. Value + label + delta only. Max 5 in a row.

slots.kpi-delta: Trend vs previous period — 11px/600, always required

delta_classes.up-bad: Increase is negative (e.g. critical findings up)

do: Use correct delta direction class to convey meaning.
dont: Never add icons inside a KPI card.
Never add colored borders or box-shadow to KPI cards.
Never use a custom background color on KPI cards.
kpi-card.example_html:
1,284
Total Assets
↑ 12%vs last month

stat-card.description: Simpler single-metric tile used inside section cards. No delta required.
stat-card.use: Supporting metrics inside a content-card, not as standalone page-level KPIs

do: Use border-radius:4px on all cards, table wrappers, panels, and chart wrappers.
Use var(--card-bg) and var(--card-border) for consistent theming.
Group related content inside a single card.
dont: Never use border-radius other than 4px on cards.
Never add box-shadow, colored borders, or background gradients to cards.
Never use cards for list data — use tables instead.
Never nest cards more than one level deep.
